title: IT Equipment Loan
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
IT Equipment Loan
Students and faculty can borrow a wide range of hardware from NYU Shanghai IT services. Items available include Apple laptops, camera tripods, and more. Contact IT Loan Services whenever you need IT resources for your project.
Who is this service available to?
All NYU community members with an active NYU NetID
What items are available?
Equipment available for loan includes laptops, cameras, audio devices and more. Click here for more details
Where do I go to borrow equipment?
Go to the IT services center in Room N525 with your NetID card.Location: Room N525Working hours: Mon-Fri: 9am - 5pm
The IT department provides a convenient self-service borrowing option. The self-service borrowing cabinet is located next to the east elevator on the 5th floor. To learn how to use it, click here to watch the instructional video.
FAQs and more
What happens if I lose or fail to return the equipment on time?Please refer to the Loan Procedure document
What happens if I lose or fail to return the equipment on time?
Please refer to the Loan Procedure document
How do I renew an item?If there aren't any holds on your checked-out item, you can renew it before your loan period ends. However, if the item is overdue, you will not be able to renew it. Please make sure that you renew your item prior to its due date. If you’d like to renew any equipment, please bring it to our front desk and we’ll take care of the rest.
How do I renew an item?
If there aren't any holds on your checked-out item, you can renew it before your loan period ends. However, if the item is overdue, you will not be able to renew it. Please make sure that you renew your item prior to its due date. If you’d like to renew any equipment, please bring it to our front desk and we’ll take care of the rest.
What if I don’t know how to use the equipment?Our equipment loan services team would be happy to provide a basic rundown of how to use all available equipment. There will also be equipment tutorial workshops in the future.
What if I don’t know how to use the equipment?
Our equipment loan services team would be happy to provide a basic rundown of how to use all available equipment. There will also be equipment tutorial workshops in the future.
What if the equipment is damaged upon return?Please refer to the Loan Procedure document
What if the equipment is damaged upon return?
Please refer to the Loan Procedure document
